title: Samguk Sagi: The History of the Three Kingdoms
description: The oldest surviving Korean history — a chronicle of Goguryeo, Baekje, and Silla from legendary times to the Goryeo dynasty.
introduction: The oldest surviving Korean history — a chronicle of Goguryeo, Baekje, and Silla from legendary times to the Goryeo dynasty.

translation.text: In the beginning, Hyeokgeose was born from an egg that descended from heaven. He founded the kingdom of Silla. The people of the six villages came to him and made him their ruler.
